caption: 出货接单统计

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(ywrybiao.bm)
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bmjl=[出货接单统计.统计人员]) or (ywrybiao.sybzj=[出货接单统计.统计人员])

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hbdm
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   (khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)

SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   (khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hhl
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

name: 出货接单统计
title_field: 出货接单统计.公用客人
